import os,pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import create_engine,text
engine=create_engine(os.getenv('DB_DSN') or os.getenv('PGURL'))
q1=text("select trade_date,count(*) rows_n from reports.bess_asset_daily_scenario_pnl group by trade_date order by trade_date desc limit 20")
q2=text("select datetime::date as trade_date,count(*) rows_n from marketdata.md_id_cleared_energy where cleared_price is not null group by 1 order by 1 desc limit 20")
print('=== reports coverage ===')
print(pd.read_sql(q1,engine).to_string(index=False))
print('=== source cleared_price coverage ===')
print(pd.read_sql(q2,engine).to_string(index=False))
